comment.body:
For anyone who is new, the limitations of Substack leads to a lot of confusion. My 2 cents on how to approach using Alma's Substack is below.... pro tip is to BOOKMARK the links in your browser:

** Review each Weekly Post every Monday (https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/s/market-analysis?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=menu)
** Review each Daily Post at beginning of the day (same link as above)

** Have two windows open for Chats everyday:
---- New Daily Chat set up each day 
---- Trading Signals Chat (set up on February 3 soon after Alma opened up the Substack; link is https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/5ec8d5aa-9fac-4e6d-aef1-3f6a28632ae4)

** Educate yourselves with these chats by reading through them:
---- Ongoing Q&A Chat (set up on February 26; https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/398075ab-2aac-41d1-bf37-8fda43ccf9aa) 
---- Options Depth Heat Map Overview (set up on February 5; https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/2aab643b-d095-4c00-8b42-4f35379fb002)

Every so often I will copy and re-paste this into chats when new folks jump in. Hope this helps!!!

comment.body: There were a lot of conflicting/confusing things in that Thursday post that have not be settled or explained... such as her saying "spot up/vol up" and in Thursday's chat saying "if market rips, thats a spot up/vol up = low liquidity", only for spot to rip 200 points in the following 2 days on declining volatility. comment.body:
Guys, I have the playbook. 
- Like I said earlier today is QYLD rebalancing from 2-4p est which is front run
- Futures tanked because everyone is overweight China and Europe v US. There is going to be a RV trade here into month end given the BaML survey data
- US equities bounced due to momentum factor and QYLD. RTY is lagging.
- NDX should go down tomorrow

comment.body:
I think so many folks on this chat overthink things.  Alma has repeatedly shared that it's a supportive OPEX.  The detail she gets into on her intraday posts are for those who want the detail of an intraday move, like very fast options trades.  

Plus if you just use her SPX script each morning for the Mean Reversion Thresholds/Momentum Measure you would have seen we bounced right off the BOTTOM RISK LEVEL this morning.  

Don't overthink it y'all, especially if you're looking for a trade beyond an hour.

comment.body: I’m sorry, but I don’t subscribe to this way of thinking. Yes, it’s true that we need to be critical, but she doesn’t have a crystal ball to predict the future even if it seems (she has a 99% hit rate👸🏼)and things change faster than we think. Sure, we have high expectations , but as far as I’m concerned, I don’t like to be critical of her analyses; instead, I always take a step back because if there’s someone here who doesn’t understand due to a lack of knowledge, it’s us. You’ll see that it will be explained this too!

comment.body: There were a lot of conflicting/confusing things in that Thursday post that have not be settled or explained... such as her saying "spot up/vol up" and in Thursday's chat saying "if market rips, thats a spot up/vol up = low liquidity", only for spot to rip 200 points in the following 2 days on declining volatility. Or saying "high volatility means low liquidity" only for volatility to drop with declining volume. Have asked numerous times for clarification to these questions to no avail.
